checklist.question: Does it use agent-browser CLI commands (not raw Playwright MCP tools)?
Does it follow the snapshot→interact→re-snapshot pattern (refs refreshed after navigation/DOM changes)?
Are refs re-obtained via snapshot after every page navigation or significant DOM change?
For authenticated sites, does it use persistent sessions (--session-name, --profile, or --state)?
Does it use proper wait strategies (wait for selector/networkidle/text) instead of arbitrary sleep/timeouts?
Does it take screenshots for visual evidence or verification when appropriate?
Does it handle errors gracefully (check command output, re-snapshot on stale refs)?
Does it use command chaining (&&) appropriately — chaining independent actions, separating when output parsing is needed?
Does it close the browser or session when the task is complete?
Does it avoid hardcoded waits (wait 5000) when a condition-based wait (wait @el, wait --text) would work?
